whatThisPluginAdds.text: HTML Cache stores full public HTML responses, indexes their model dependencies, and supports immediate or scheduled stale regeneration with public-output safety checks.

surfaceOutcome.text: Administrators inspect coverage, dependency maps, and stale work, then clear, warm, or regenerate cached pages. Anonymous visitors receive cached public HTML without authoring markers or session cookies.

developers.text: Middleware eligibility rules and dependency-indexed Actions keep cache writes, invalidation, stale claims, and atomic refresh behavior explicit and testable.

teams.text: Teams can see whether important URLs are cached and recover from stale output without weakening the rule that admin and authoring details stay out of public files.
